mnemonics: HODS: The warehouse holds all your data (Holds Operational Data Stores)
keyPoints: Stores historical and current data from multiple sources
Uses a schema optimized for querying and analysis (e.g., star schema)
Separated from operational databases to avoid performance impact
commonMistakes: Confusing a data warehouse with a regular operational database
Designing the storage with a normalized schema instead of a dimensional model
Failing to properly manage ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes leading to poor data quality
